title: Lemon Tree
description: A simple mod about citrus fruits
body:
### Welcome to Lemon tree!

**NOTE: THIS MOD REQUIRES TERRABLENDER**

Lemon Tree is a simple smaller mod that adds new foods and blocks relating to some citrus fruits. The new fruits added are Lemons, Limes, and Grapefruits and each come with their own new food items! Lemon based desserts (outside of the lemon bar) have a chance to give Regeneration when eaten, Lime based desserts (outside of the lime bar) can give speed, and finally Grapefruit based desserts (outside of the grapefruit bar) have a chance give Resistance. The three new drinks added in the mod also can give potion effects, Lemonade giving Fire Resistance, Lime Water giving the new effect Frost Resistence, and Pink Lemonade giving both for a short amount of time. Lemons can uniquely be crafted into a throwable TNT! Hold it to throw farther, but don't hold it too long or it will explode!

![All Items in the mod as of version 1.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac57a73e1ba3eda6968acbd3e0459ab9fc6153e3.png)

**SECONDARY NOTE: THIS IS THE FIRST MOD I HAVE EVER MADE WITH FABRIC, SO PLEASE ENJOY!**
